chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1015 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.4771/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr.Ahmed Ali Ghumro, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Present petition asserts right in immoveable property and the same is not amenable for adjudication under writ jurisdiction, even otherwise, the other prayer clauses are in nature of harassment petition, which cannot be entertained in view of Division Bench Judgment reported as PLD 2019 Sindh 168. In view hereof, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
